categories.label: Reputation Tiles
categories.description: Sum of VP values on all face-down Reputation Tiles (1-4 VP each)

categories.label: Ambassador Tiles
categories.description: 1 VP per Ambassador Tile on your Reputation Track

categories.label: Controlled Sectors
categories.description: Sum of VP values on all Sectors you Control (1-4 VP each)

categories.label: Monoliths
categories.description: 3 VP per Monolith on Controlled Sectors

categories.label: Discovery Tiles
categories.description: 2 VP per Discovery Tile kept VP-side-up

categories.label: Tech Track Progress
categories.description: VP from progress on each Tech Track (Military, Grid, Nano) based on leftmost uncovered VP symbol

categories.label: Species Bonuses
categories.description: VP from species-specific scoring abilities (e.g., Planta extra sector VP, Descendants per Ancient)

categories.label: Traitor Tile
categories.description: -2 VP if you hold the Traitor Tile at game end
